factCheck: Verify exact totals and order of #3-5. Some sources list Eaton above Kareem. Confirm Tim Duncan (~3,020) vs. David Robinson (~2,954) for #5.

factCheck: Verify Curry's exact total (active). Confirm Harden vs. Allen order at #2-3. Check if LeBron James has surpassed Vince Carter for #5.

question: Name the players with the most career games played in NBA history.
factCheck: Verify whether Dirk Nowitzki (~1,522), Vince Carter (~1,541), or LeBron James have displaced Stockton, Malone, or Willis in the top 5.

question: Name the NBA players with the most championship rings.
factCheck: Four players share 8 rings (Havlicek, K.C. Jones, Heinsohn, Satch Sanders) — all Boston Celtics dynasty players. Alphabetical tiebreaker by first name: John < K.C. < Tom H. < Tom S. Verify Frank Ramsey's total (believed to be 7, not 8, excluding him from this group).

question: Name the NBA franchises with the most championship titles.
factCheck: Celtics and Lakers tied at 17 — alphabetical: Boston before Los Angeles. Confirm Warriors at 7 (1947, 1956, 1975, 2015, 2017, 2018, 2022). Confirm Bulls at 6, Spurs at 5.

question: Name the NBA players with the most regular-season MVP awards.
factCheck: Tie at 5: Bill (Russell) before Michael (Jordan) alphabetically by first name. Tie at 4: LeBron (L) before Wilt (W) alphabetically. Confirm Wilt has exactly 4 MVPs (1960, 1966, 1967, 1968).

question: Name the NBA players with the most Finals MVP awards.
factCheck: Three-way tie at 3: Magic (M) before Shaquille (S) before Tim (T) by first name. Verify Tim Duncan won 3 Finals MVPs and not 4 (2007 Finals MVP was Tony Parker, not Duncan).

question: Name the NBA players with the most scoring titles (seasons leading the league in scoring).
factCheck: Three-way tie at 4: Allen (Iverson) before George (Gervin) before Kevin (Durant) by first name. Verify Durant's scoring title count and whether James Harden also won 4 or more scoring titles.

question: Name the NBA head coaches with the most career wins.
factCheck: Popovich surpassed Nelson and Wilkens before retiring in 2025 — verify his exact final total and reorder the top 3 accordingly. Confirm Pat Riley at #4 and Larry Brown at #5.

question: Name the NBA head coaches with the most championship titles.
factCheck: Three-way tie at 5: Gregg (G) before John (J) before Pat (P) by first name. Verify John Kundla's count coaching the Minneapolis Lakers dynasty (1948–1954). Confirm no other coach has 3 or more titles besides these five.

question: Name the players with the highest single-season scoring averages in NBA history, excluding Wilt Chamberlain.
factCheck: Verify Elgin Baylor's 38.3 PPG in 1961-62 (NBA only). Confirm Rick Barry's 35.6 was his NBA season (1966-67, San Francisco Warriors) and not his ABA season. Verify Harden (36.1) ranks above Barry (35.6) and Kobe (35.4).

question: Name the players with the most 3-pointers made in a single NBA season.
factCheck: Curry at 402 is clearly #1. Verify exact totals and ordering for #2-5 among Harden (~299), Hield (~278), Klay Thompson (~276). Confirm Paul George at #5 over Damian Lillard or Trae Young.

question: Name the tallest players in NBA history.
factCheck: Tie at 7'7": Gheorghe (G) before Manute (M) by first name. Tie at 7'6": Shawn (S-h-a) before Slavko (S-l-a) before Yao (Y) by first name. Verify no other player has reached 7'6" or taller (Chuck Nevitt listed at 7'5" — confirm excluded).

question: Name the NBA franchises with the most wins in a single regular season.
factCheck: Tie at 68 wins: Boston (B) before Philadelphia (P) alphabetically. Verify Lakers had exactly 69 wins in 1971-72. Confirm San Antonio Spurs (67 wins in 2015-16) do not reach 68+.

question: Name the NBA players with the most career triple-doubles.
factCheck: Verify Westbrook's exact total and LeBron's total (active). Confirm LeBron has surpassed Kidd for #4, or adjust ranking if not. Order: Westbrook, Robertson, Magic (138), Kidd (107), LeBron (100+).

question: Name the NBA players with the most All-Star Game selections.
factCheck: Verify LeBron's total (active player, may have increased beyond 20). Tie at 15: Tim (Duncan) before Kevin (Garnett) by first name. Verify Shaquille O'Neal also had 15 — confirm Shaq excluded by same tiebreaker (S after K).

answers.display: LeBron James — age 28 years, 17 days (youngest ever)

question: Name the NBA franchises with the most Finals appearances.
factCheck: Verify all appearance counts, including franchise history continuations (Warriors from Philadelphia/SF eras, 76ers from Syracuse Nationals era). Confirm Miami Heat (7) and San Antonio Spurs (6) do not displace the top 5. Verify Lakers' exact total including Minneapolis years.

question: Name the players with the most career points scored in NBA playoff history.
factCheck: Verify LeBron's exact total (active through recent seasons). Confirm Kareem (~5,762) ranks above Kobe (~5,640) at #3-4. Confirm Karl Malone at #5 over Tim Duncan (~3,941).

question: Name the players with the most points scored in a single NBA Finals game.
factCheck: NEEDS HEAVY VERIFICATION. Baylor's 61-point Finals record is well-documented. Rick Barry and Jordan tied at 55 — tiebreaker: Rick (R) before Michael (M)? No: M < R alphabetically, so Jordan ranks above Barry. Recheck ordering if both are at 55. Verify West's 53 and LeBron's 51. Do not use without fact-checking box scores.

question: Name the colleges that have produced the most first overall NBA Draft picks all-time.
factCheck: NEEDS HEAVY VERIFICATION. Kentucky (Anthony Davis 2012, Karl-Anthony Towns 2015, plus others) likely leads. Duke has several (Elton Brand 1999, Zion Williamson 2019). question: Name the NBA players with the most Defensive Player of the Year awards.
factCheck: Three-way tie at 4: Ben (Wallace) before Dikembe (Mutombo) before Rudy (Gobert) by first name. Verify Gobert's total — he may have won a 5th DPOY after 2022. Confirm Sidney Moncrief at #5 among players with 2 awards (others: Alvin Robertson, Mark Eaton, Dennis Rodman).

question: Name the NBA players with the most consecutive seasons leading the league in scoring.
factCheck: Tie at 7: Michael (Jordan) before Wilt (Chamberlain) by first name. Tie at 4: George (Gervin) before Kevin (Durant) by first name. Verify Neil Johnston's 3 consecutive titles for #5. Confirm Allen Iverson did not have 3+ consecutive scoring titles.

question: Name the players with the highest single-game assist totals in NBA history.
factCheck: Skiles' 30-assist game (Orlando vs Denver, Dec 30, 1990) is well-documented as the all-time record. Tie at 28: Bob (Cousy) before Guy (Rodgers) by first name. Verify Kevin Porter's 29-assist game and Geoff Huston's 27 at #5.

question: Name the NBA players with the most career games with 50 or more points.
factCheck: Verify counts for #2-5. Confirm Kobe (25) ranks above Baylor (17) at #3-4. Check whether James Harden or LeBron James have surpassed Rick Barry for #5.

question: Name the players with the most career assists in NBA playoff history.
factCheck: Verify LeBron's exact playoff assist total (active) and whether he has surpassed Stockton for #2. Confirm Larry Bird at #5 over Isiah Thomas, Dennis Johnson, or Tony Parker.
